author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
PlayStation State of Play June 2026 Livestream
PlayStation's State of Play returns Tuesday, June 2 at 2pm PT with more than 60 minutes of news, updates, announcements, and gameplay reveals from top studios around the world. What else will we get to see other than Marvel's Wolverine? 

To start the show off we'll get a look at Marvel’s Wolverine. Insomniac Games will be sharing more info from its upcoming third-person action-adventure game showing off Logan’s brutal and relentless combat along with some brand new details. Marvel's Wolverine is coming to PS5 September 15. 

Join us after the State of Play recaps for a post-show where we'll talk about the biggest news, updates, and reveals from the State of Play showcase.

#playstation #ps5 #stateofplay #gaming

Follow our curator page on steam:
https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Best PlayStation State of Play Trailers (June 2026)
PlayStation State of Play brought many new reveals. Cory Barlog, head of creative of Santa Monica Studios, announced his next project God of War Laufey. Former Ghostwire: Tokyo creative director Ikumi Nakamura revealed gameplay of Kemuri: Hunt the Unseen. Plus, we saw several new games, including Control Resonant, Silent Hill, and Tomb Raider. 

#Sony #gamespot

text:
God of War Laufey - Official 20 Minute Gameplay Reveal Trailer
Death was supposed to be the end, but for Laufey (Faye), warrior and wife to Kratos, a new adventure is just beginning. 
Santa Monica Studio reveals an extended look at God of War Laufey’s gameplay.

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Onimusha: Way of the Sword - Official Release Date Reveal Gameplay Trailer
Onimusha: Way of the Sword, an all-new entry in Capcom's swordplay action series, will be released on Friday, September 25, 2026!

Check out the newest trailer for a first glimpse of the Mount Oe stage, and the fearsome boss who waits there, Shuten Doji.
 

Check out the official site and social media account for the latest on the demo and the various bonuses up for grabs.
 
Footage represents a game still in development.
Some footage was captured with enemy dismemberment death effects disabled.
 
Onimusha: Way of the Sword, an all-new entry in the Onimusha series, plunges the Oni Gauntlet wielding protagonist, Miyamoto Musashi into an early Edo-period Kyoto under siege by monstrous fiends known as Genma. Feel the ring of steel on steel as blades clash in a tense back and forth duels. Cut down foes with authentic and satisfying swordplay. Awaken Oni Powers to pull off superhuman feats. All these elements combine to deliver an unprecedented swordplay action experience you will not want to miss.
 
#ps5 #ps5games #stateofplay #onimushawayofthesword

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Rayman Legends Retold Is A Lot More Than Your Average Remake
Rayman Legends Retold is a ground up remake of the 2013 classic, but is offering a lot more than just an upgrade to its visuals. It very well may be the foundation for the future of the series.

#rayman #raymanlegends #remake #gaming #gameplay

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Until Dawn 2 - Official Announcement Trailer
"Ready to die for likes? Join a team of ambitious ghost hunters as they chase their next viral hit on a remote island haunted by a woman's chilling story of something far darker than they bargained for.
 
When the tale begins to manifest in terrifying ways, survival will take more than a strong signal to get off the island alive. Their lives are in your hands. Make every choice count.
 
Until Dawn 2 comes to PlayStation®5 consoles in 2027.
  
#ps5 #ps5games #stateofplay #UntilDawn2 #playstation5 #horror 

Follow our curator page on steam:
https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Control Resonant - Story And Release Date Reveal Trailer
Manhattan is under attack by otherworldly forces. Humanity's only shot at survival is Dylan Faden, who has to remember how to be human again himself. But can he let go of the echoes of the past? And can he do it before all is lost to the Hiss?
 
CONTROL Resonant releases August 27, 2026 on PlayStation 5. Pre-order now.
 
#ps5 #ps5games #stateofplay #controlresonant

https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Kemuri: Hunt the Unseen - First Gameplay Reveal Trailer
If you noticed something out of the ordinary in your daily life, 
would you ignore it, or take a closer look?
 
KEMURI is a Yokai Possession Action Game about taking that first step into the unknown.
 
Welcome to Kemuri City — the city closest to the afterlife, where reality and the other side have never quite stayed separate. As a Yokai Hunter, use the Fox Window to reveal what others cannot see, form contracts with the yokai you encounter, and wear their power as Possession Apparel. Your appearance, your movement, your way of fighting — everything changes.
 
Play solo or with up to 3 players in co-op.
Welcome to Kemuri City. 
Now that you've seen it, it can't be unseen.
 
Coming to PlayStation 5 in 2027.
 
#ps5 #ps5games #stateofplay #kemuri #ActionGame #IkumiNakamura #FoxWindow #Yokai #YokaiHunter #YokaiPossession #art

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Silent Hill: Townfall - Release Date Reveal Trailer
SILENT HILL: Townfall is coming to PS5 on September 24th - Pre-Order Now for bonus content.
 
Simon Ordell is called back to the island of St. Amelia to ‘put things right’, encountering a town lying quiet beneath a heavy fog, seemingly abandoned but not at rest.
  
Venturing deeper, and driven to understand his connection to the place and its inhabitants, Simon begins to discover fragments of a past rising to the surface.
 
#ps5 #ps5games #silenthill #stateofplay #silenthilltownfall

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Tokon: Fighting Souls - Magneto, Green Goblin, and Carnage Gameplay Reveal | Knights of Doom Trailer
The Champion may have destroyed entire planets, but he has never faced the Knights of Doom!
 
The fourth team to enter the fray in MARVEL Tōkon: Fighting Souls is led by Doctor Doom, joined by a merciless host of villains as new playable characters: Magneto, Green Goblin, and Carnage!

Coming to PS5 and PC on August 6th, 2026 PT!

text:
Marvel’s Wolverine - Extended Gameplay Reveal Trailer
With the fate of humans and mutants hanging in the balance, Logan knows the world needs a hero. However, they’ll have to settle for Wolverine. Get an expanded look at gameplay from Marvel's Wolverine, which teases major characters, story details, and more!
 
Marvel’s Wolverine arrives on PlayStation 5 consoles September 15, 2026.
